campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 19, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026, where they discussed staffing vacancies and efforts to recruit and retain city employees. The council also addressed the upcoming Boogie Festival happening that weekend.
keyTopics: City staffing vacancies and recruitment/retention strategies
Boogie Festival event this weekend
Public hearing on government code section 3502 matters

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — May 6, 2026
saratoga.summary: The Saratoga City Council approved an engineer's report and moved forward with a public hearing process for a proposed ordinance scheduled for final adoption on May 20th. The council also discussed whether to pursue charter city status and reviewed preliminary tax and revenue options.
keyTopics: Engineer's Report approval for fiscal year planning
Public hearing and ordinance adoption timeline (May 20, 2026)
Charter city status consideration and next steps
Preliminary tax and revenue options under review

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — June 2, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council held their June 2, 2026 meeting to approve meeting minutes, appoint a youth commissioner, and set up the November 2026 municipal election for three open seats. The council also approved a housing development map, authorized the town manager to sign several service agreements, and worked on the budget.
keyTopics: November 3, 2026 general municipal election scheduled for three Town Council seats
New youth commissioner appointment recommended by selection committee
Final approval of Tract 10675 development map on Boulevard
Multi-year software agreement with Accela for permit and planning services
Building division plan check service contracts authorized

san-jose.title: San José City Council — June 3, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a planning meeting to organize upcoming council sessions scheduled for June 9 and June 16, 2026. The council reviewed which items to add to their agendas, decided whether any items needed specific time slots, and approved retroactive use of the Janet Gray Hayes Rotunda for an event on June 7.
keyTopics: Finalized agenda items for June 9, 2026 council meeting
Draft agenda planning for June 16, 2026 meeting
Retroactive approval for Janet Gray Hayes Rotunda event usage

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — June 2, 2026
mountain-view.summary: This June 2, 2026 Mountain View City Council meeting was held with both in-person and online options for residents. The meeting provided instructions for community members who wanted to participate virtually via Zoom or phone to comment on agenda items.
keyTopics: Virtual meeting access via Zoom (ID: 814 1954 3379) or phone (669-900-9128)
Instructions for public comment: use 'raise hand' in Zoom or dial *9, then *6 to unmute when called

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — June 2, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held two special meetings on June 2, 2026. The first was a closed session (private discussion) followed by a public special meeting, though the specific topics discussed are not detailed in the available agenda.
keyTopics: Closed session held before public meeting
Special order of the day items on agenda

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — June 2, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to approve proclamations recognizing June as LGBTQ+ Pride Month and to acknowledge the United Nations World Environment Day on June 5, 2026. The meeting also included a public comment period where residents could speak about any city matters not on the official agenda.
keyTopics: LGBTQ+ Pride Month proclamation
United Nations World Environment Day recognition
Public comment period for non-agenda items (30 minutes)

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — June 3, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara is holding Charter Review Committee meetings to discuss potential changes to the city's governing document. Residents can attend in person or join online via Zoom, and can submit written comments by email.
keyTopics: Charter Review Committee meetings scheduled (in-person and remote options available)
Public comment submission: email cityattorney@santaclaraca.gov by 10 a.m. the day before the meeting
Zoom access: Meeting ID 882 3044 7375, phone dial-in 1-669-444-9171

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — June 2, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council met to approve the city's operating budget for fiscal year 2026-27 and handle routine administrative matters like meeting schedules and minutes. The council also discussed changes to how commission appointments are scheduled throughout the year.
keyTopics: Approved the 2026-27 city operating budget
Adopted new commission appointment schedule (quarterly cycles)
Reviewed upcoming agenda items for the next meeting

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 27, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council met to review the city's spending plan for 2027-2031 and discuss efforts to increase housing availability. The council also addressed downtown parking improvements, though that discussion was postponed to a future meeting.
keyTopics: Five-year capital improvement and budget plan for 2027-2031
Prohousing designation program to increase housing supply
Downtown parking modernization initiatives
